rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions And Recovery Of Attorneys Fees And Expenses Ccp Sections 128.5, 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Arndt Peltner's Motion for Sanctions and a Recovery of Attorney's Fees and Expenses is denied with prejudice. With respect to CCP section 128.7, Peltner has failed to comply with the procedural requirements of that section. With respect to CCP section 128.5, Peltner did not specify the expenses sought as required by subsection (c). Herterich's request for sanctions pursuant to CCP sections 128.7(c)(1) and 128.5 in the amount of $4,175 contained in his opposition is denied. The Court does not find that Peltner's motion was the result of bad-faith actions or tactics that are frivolous, or solely intended to cause unnecessary delay; nor that the motion was for an improper purpose or to needlessly increase the cost of litigation; nor that the motion was unwarranted. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) by 4 p.m. on May 24, 2016.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions And An Award Of Attorney Fees And Expenses In The Amount Of $6,835. [Code Civ. Proc. 128.7(H)]
rulings.Rulings: Norman Herterich's Motion for Sanctions is denied with prejudice. The Court does not find that Peltner's motion was brought for an improper purpose as described in CCP section 128.7, subdivision (h). Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) by 4 p.m. on May 24, 2016.
